YCSB 提供评测键值存储的框架和六种标准工作负载。作者在 100GB 数据库上比较 LevelDB、RocksDB 与 WiscKey。除 WiscKey 的常规表现外，还让垃圾回收始终在后台运行，以测量其最坏性能。RocksDB 是面向 SSD 优化的 LevelDB 变体，具有多 memtable 和多后台压实线程等功能，实验采用默认配置。值大小分别为 1KB 和 16KB，关闭压缩。

如图 21 所示，WiscKey 显著快于 LevelDB 和 RocksDB。例如加载 1KB 值时，常规 WiscKey 至少快 50 倍，始终回收的最坏情况也至少快 45 倍；值为 16KB 时，即使最坏情况仍快 104 倍。

多数工作负载使用 Zipf 分布读取键，热门项可被缓存而无需访问设备，因此会缩小 WiscKey 相对 LevelDB 和 RocksDB 的优势。WiscKey 在含 50% 读取的工作负载 A 中相对优势大于含 95% 读取的 B 和全读取的 C，但后两者仍无法追平 WiscKey。即便在只读负载中强制始终垃圾回收，WiscKey 的最坏性能仍优于另外两种系统。

垃圾回收对 1KB 和 16KB 值的影响明显不同。回收器每次选择并清理 4MB vLog 数据块。值较小时，数据块包含许多键值对，回收器要花更多时间访问 LSM 树验证每一对是否有效；值较大时，验证较少，会更积极地写出清理后的块，从而更明显地影响前台吞吐量。如有必要，可以限制垃圾回收速度来减轻影响。

工作负载 E 包含许多小范围查询，每次取 1 到 100 个键值对。由于每个范围的第一个键都要做一次随机查找，这一场景对 WiscKey 有利；因此即使值只有 1KB，WiscKey 仍优于 RocksDB 和 LevelDB。

图 21 的负载含义如下：Load 构建 100GB 数据库，类似随机加载微基准；A 为 50% 读、50% 更新；B 为 95% 读、5% 更新；C 为 100% 读，键采用 Zipf 分布，更新针对已有键；D 为 95% 读、5% 插入新键，采用时间加权分布；E 为 95% 范围查询、5% 插入新键；F 为 50% 读、50% 读—改—写。柱顶数字表示实际吞吐量（千次操作每秒）。

sections.title: 5. RELATED WORK
sections.originalMarkdown:
Various key-value stores based on hash tables have been proposed for SSD devices. FAWN [Andersen et al. 2009] keeps key-value pairs in an append-only log on the SSD and uses an in-memory hash table index for fast lookups. FlashStore [Debnath et al. 2010] and SkimpyStash [Debnath et al. 2011] follow the same design but optimize the in-memory hash table; FlashStore uses cuckoo hashing and compact key signatures, while SkimpyStash moves a part of the table to the SSD using linear chaining. BufferHash [Anand et al. 2010] uses multiple in-memory hash tables, with Bloom ﬁlters to choose which hash table to use for a lookup. SILT [Lim et al. 2011] is highly optimized for memory and uses a combination of log structure, hash table, and sorted table layouts.

WiscKey shares the log-structure data layout with these key-value stores. However , these stores use hash tables for indexing, and thus do not support modern features that have been built atop LSM-tree stores, such as range queries or snapshots. WiscKey instead targets a feature-rich key-value store that can be used in various situations.

Much work has gone into optimizing the original LSM-tree key-value store [ONeil et al. 1996]. bLSM [Sears and Ramakrishnan 2012] presents a new merge scheduler to bound write latency , thus maintaining a steady write throughput, and also uses Bloom ﬁlters to improve performance. VT -tree [Shetty et al. 2013] avoids sorting any previously sorted key-value pairs during compaction by using a layer of indirection. WiscKey instead directly separates values from keys, signiﬁcantly reducing write ampliﬁcation regardless of the key distribution in the workload. LOCS [Wang et al. 2014] exposes internal ﬂash channels to the LSM-tree key-value store, which can exploit the abundant parallelism for a more efﬁcient compaction. Atlas [Lai et al. 2015] is a distributed key-value store based on ARM processors and erasure coding, and stores keys and values on different hard drives. WiscKey is a stand-alone key-value store, where the separation between keys and values is highly optimized for SSD devices to achieve signiﬁcant performance gains. LSM-trie [Wu et al. 2015] uses a trie structure to organize keys and proposes a more efﬁcient compaction based on the trie; however , this design sacriﬁces LSM-tree features such as efﬁcient support for range queries. RocksDB, described previously , still exhibits high write ampliﬁcation due to its design being fundamentally similar to LevelDB; RocksDB’s optimizations are orthogonal to WiscKey’s design.

Walnut [Chen et al. 2012] is a hybrid object store that stores small objects in an LSMtree and writes large objects directly to the ﬁle system. IndexFS [Ren et al. 2014] stores its metadata in an LSM-tree with the column-style schema to speed up the throughput of insertion. Purity [Colgrove et al. 2015] also separates its index from data tuples by only sorting the index and storing tuples in time order . All three systems use similar techniques as WiscKey . However , we solve this problem in a more generic and complete manner , and optimize both load and lookup performance for SSD devices across a wide range of workloads. Key-value stores based on other data structures have also been proposed.

TokuDB [Bender et al. 2007; Buchsbaum et al. 2000] is based on fractal-tree indexes, which buffer updates in internal nodes; the keys are not sorted, and a large index has to be maintained in memory for good performance. ForestDB [Ahn et al. 2016] uses a HB+trie to efﬁciently index long keys, improving the performance and reducing the space overhead of internal nodes. NVMKV [Marmol et al. 2015] is an FTL-aware key-value store that uses native FTL capabilities, such as sparse addressing, and transactional supports. Vector interfaces that group multiple requests into a single operation are also proposed for key-value stores [Vasudevan et al. 2012]. Since these key-value stores are based on different data structures, they each have different tradeoffs relating to performance; instead, WiscKey proposes improving the widely used LSM-tree structure.

Many proposed techniques seek to overcome the scalability bottlenecks of in-memory key-value stores, such as Masstree [Mao et al. 2012], MemC3 [Fan et al. 2013], Memcache [Nishtala et al. 2013], MICA [Lim et al. 2014], and cLSM [Golan-Gueta et al. 2015]. These techniques may be adapted for WiscKey to further improve its performance.
sections.translationMarkdown:
已经有多种基于哈希表的 SSD 键值存储。FAWN 把键值对保存在 SSD 的只追加日志中，并使用内存哈希表索引实现快速查询。FlashStore 和 SkimpyStash 采用相同总体设计，但优化内存哈希表：前者使用布谷鸟哈希和紧凑键签名，后者通过线性链把部分表移到 SSD。BufferHash 使用多个内存哈希表，并通过 Bloom 过滤器选择查询哪个表。SILT 高度优化内存占用，组合使用日志结构、哈希表和有序表布局。

WiscKey 与这些系统一样采用日志结构数据布局，但后者用哈希表索引，无法支持范围查询、快照等建立在 LSM 存储之上的现代功能。WiscKey 的目标则是可用于多种场景、功能丰富的键值存储。

大量研究尝试优化原始 LSM 树。bLSM 提出新的合并调度器以限制写延迟、维持稳定吞吐量，并使用 Bloom 过滤器提升性能。VT-tree 通过间接层避免在压实时重新排序已经有序的键值对。WiscKey 直接把值从键中分离，无论负载键分布如何都能显著降低写放大。LOCS 向 LSM 键值存储暴露闪存内部通道，使其利用并行性更高效地压实。Atlas 是基于 ARM 处理器和纠删码的分布式键值存储，把键和值放在不同硬盘；WiscKey 是单机系统，其键值分离针对 SSD 深度优化。LSM-trie 用 trie 组织键并据此改进压实，但牺牲了高效范围查询等 LSM 功能。RocksDB 虽有多项优化，其基本设计仍类似 LevelDB，因此写放大依然很高；这些优化与 WiscKey 的设计可以相互结合。

Walnut 是混合对象存储，把小对象放入 LSM 树，大对象直接写文件系统。IndexFS 以列式模式把元数据存入 LSM 树来提升插入吞吐量。Purity 也分离索引与数据元组，只对索引排序，而元组按时间顺序存放。这些系统与 WiscKey 采用了相似技术，但 WiscKey 以更通用、完整的方式解决问题，并在广泛工作负载上同时优化 SSD 的加载和查询性能。

还有一些系统采用其他数据结构。TokuDB 基于分形树索引，在内部节点缓冲更新；键不排序，大索引需要驻留内存才能获得良好性能。ForestDB 使用 HB+-trie 高效索引长键，改善性能并减少内部节点空间开销。NVMKV 感知闪存转换层，使用稀疏寻址和事务支持等原生 FTL 能力。也有研究为键值存储提出把多个请求组合成一次操作的向量接口。这些系统因数据结构不同而具有各自权衡；WiscKey 的目标是改进使用最广泛的 LSM 树结构。

Masstree、MemC3、Memcache、MICA 和 cLSM 等工作主要解决内存键值存储的扩展瓶颈，其中一些技术也可用于 WiscKey，进一步提升性能。

sections.title: 6. CONCLUSIONS
sections.originalMarkdown:
Key-value stores have become a fundamental building block in data-intensive applications. In this article, we propose WiscKey , a novel LSM-tree-based key-value store that separates keys and values to minimize write and read ampliﬁcation. The data layout and I/O patterns of WiscKey are highly optimized for SSD devices. Our results show that WiscKey can signiﬁcantly improve performance for most workloads. We believe there are many avenues for future work.

For example, in WiscKey , garbage collection is done by a single background thread. The thread reads a chunk of key-value pairs from the tail of the vLog ﬁle; then, for each key-value pair , it checks the LSM-tree for validity; ﬁnally , the valid key-value pairs are written back to the head of the vLog ﬁle. We can improve garbage collection in two ways. First, lookups in the LSM-tree are slow since multiple random reads may be required. To speed up this process, we can use multiple threads to perform the lookup concurrently for different key-value pairs. Second, we can make garbage collection more effective by maintaining a bitmap of invalid key-value pairs in the vLog ﬁle.

When the garbage collection is triggered, it will ﬁrst reclaim the chunk with the highest percentage of free space. Another interesting direction to scale LevelDB or WiscKey is sharding the database. Many components of LevelDB are single threaded due to a single shared database. As we discussed before, there is a single memtable to buffer writes in memory . When the memtable is full, the foreground writes will be stalled until the compaction thread ﬂushes the memtable to disk. In LevelDB, only a single writer can be allowed to update the database. The database is protected by a global mutex. The background compaction thread also needs to grab this mutex when sorting the key-value pairs, competing with the foreground writes. For a multiple-writer workload, this architecture can unnecessarily block concurrent writes.

One solution is to partition the database and related memory structures into multiple smaller shards. Each shard’s keys will not overlap with others. Under this design, writes to different key-value ranges can be done concurrently to different shards. A random lookup can also be distributed to one target shard, without searching all shards. This new design may make lookups faster because of a smaller dataset to search. Our initial work on a prototype implementation of sharded WiscKey has yielded substantial beneﬁts, and thus is another clear direction for future work.
sections.translationMarkdown:
键值存储已成为数据密集型应用的基础构件。本文提出 WiscKey：一种新型 LSM 树键值存储，通过分离键和值来降低读放大和写放大。其数据布局和 I/O 模式针对 SSD 深度优化，实验结果表明它能显著改善大多数工作负载的性能。

未来工作有多个方向。当前 WiscKey 由单个后台线程执行垃圾回收：线程从 vLog tail 读取一块键值对，逐个查询 LSM 树判断有效性，再把有效键值对写回 vLog head。可从两方面改善。第一，LSM 树查询可能需要多次随机读取，速度较慢；可以用多个线程并发验证不同键值对。第二，可以维护一张标记 vLog 无效键值对的位图，触发回收时优先处理空闲比例最高的数据块，提高回收效率。

另一个扩展 LevelDB 或 WiscKey 的方向是数据库分片。LevelDB 的许多组件受单一共享数据库限制而只能单线程运行。系统只有一个 memtable 缓冲写入；memtable 写满时，前台写会停顿，直到压实线程将其刷到磁盘。LevelDB 只允许一个写入者更新数据库，并使用全局互斥锁保护数据库；后台压实排序时也需要竞争这把锁，因此多写入者负载中的并发写可能被无谓阻塞。

一种解决方法是把数据库及相关内存结构划分成多个较小分片，各分片的键范围互不重叠。不同键范围的写入便可并发落到不同分片；随机查询也能直接路由到目标分片，无需搜索所有分片。较小的待搜索数据集还可能加快查询。作者在 WiscKey 分片原型上的初步工作已经取得显著收益，因此这是明确的后续研究方向。

terms.definition: 将写入先批量缓存在内存，再通过后台压实逐层合并到磁盘的有序索引结构。

接收新写入的内存有序结构，写满后成为不可变内存表并刷成 SSTable。
WiscKey 中单独、顺序追加保存值及其键元数据的日志文件。
只在 LSM 树中排序键和值位置，把实际值存入独立日志，以减少压实搬移的数据量。
底层设备实际写入量与应用逻辑写入量之比；高写放大会消耗带宽并缩短 SSD 寿命。

一种节省空间的概率结构，可快速判断键一定不存在，但可能产生假阳性。
延迟分布高分位处的响应时间，用于描述少数最慢请求的体验。
在不改变逻辑文件大小的情况下释放文件指定区间所占物理块的文件系统功能。

用于比较键值存储的标准基准框架，包含读写、更新、扫描等六类典型负载。
